case_title: PHIL CHOI ET AL VS. CARLOS MARTINEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-01-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, CARLOS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS PHIL CHOI AND YVINNE TSANG ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS CARLOS MARTINEZ AND NAHUM MARTINEZ ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOI, PHIL TSANG, YVONNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, CARLOS MARTINEZ, NAHUM $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,105.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHOI, PHIL TSANG, YVONNE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, CARLOS MARTINEZ, NAHUM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
